scope: Scope F — classify and, where safe, integrate structured-family editing into the unified pending ledger.

unifiedPendingLedger.note: The pending ledger now merges three entry kinds behind one snapshot interface. Scalar dead-man-kept changes (which include the supervised input rows) participate directly. hl.animation/hl.curve keep their own supervised Preview/Keep/Revert/Save flow with auto-revert, which is a different lifecycle than applied-live-until-discarded; they are reported here rather than force-fit into the ledger.

families.editableShapes: enabled toggle and bezier-curve reference are proven and wired through the supervised record preview (Preview/Keep/Revert/Save with auto-revert)
families.blockedShapes: animation STYLE values (slide/popin/slidefade/...) remain blocked — no trusted style-grammar evidence (see style-editing-evidence report)
families.pendingLedger: supervised flow, outside the applied-live ledger by design; Save uses the family gated persistence path
families.reason: record semantics differ from scalar apply-live; the supervised countdown is the safe model

families.editableShapes: existing bezier curve control points via the Bezier Curve Editor (existing curves only), gated Save
families.blockedShapes: creating brand-new named curves beyond proven shapes
families.pendingLedger: supervised flow, outside the applied-live ledger by design

families.reason: high-risk display recovery not proven (see high-risk-recovery-backend). The Monitors page shows the monitor line read-only. Editability stays blocked until a display-specific dead-man rollback is proven.
families.proofRequirement: capture monitor name/resolution/refresh/position/scale/transform/enabled + original rule; apply temporary; verify; revert-verify; fail closed if verification impossible

families.reason: read-only source-entry view; no edit/preview/save path. Keybind editing needs conflict detection, duplicate-bind detection, reserved-bind warnings, and parser/write/reread + rollback proof that do not yet exist.
families.proofRequirement: bind grammar validator + conflict/duplicate/reserved detection + write/reread + safe-save/rollback proof, then pending-ledger integration

families.reason: no trusted runtime readback listing exists on this compositor version, so no original state can be captured; no edit path. Not guessed.
families.proofRequirement: a trusted gesture readback mechanism (or a source-backed schema) before any edit path

families.reason: device records reconfigure input hardware; per-device rows are hardware-gated. Only devices actually present could be proven, and their edits would need dead-man rollback or save-only staging by risk.
families.proofRequirement: real device present + per-device rollback or save-only proof

families.reason: high-risk policy editing; needs strict source-backed validators and parser/write/reread + rollback/safe-save proof that do not yet exist. A wrong permission line can silently grant or deny privileged protocol access.
families.proofRequirement: source-backed permission grammar + validator + write/reread + rollback proof

tests: tests/structured_family_unified.rs and the structured_family_* suite (pre-existing) remain green
the DeadManKept ledger source is covered by the live GUI proof (input.repeat_rate kept -> pending -> discard reverts) and by dead_man_rollback_dialog.rs

guiEvidence.monitorBlocked: e-monitors-page.png (monitor line read-only; render options Blocked)
